summary: Comprehensive testing of Full Script Mode feature. All 15 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend Playwright tests passed - Full Script flow (paste script > enter character > find scenes > select scenes > batch analyze), ScriptOverview with scene tabs and navigation, 'Go Deeper' button visibility logic, and regression tests for existing Paste/Upload sides flows.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/parse-scenes with INT./EXT. headers correctly splits into 3 scenes
Backend: POST /api/parse-scenes correctly detects Sarah in 2 scenes (Kitchen, Apartment)
Backend: POST /api/parse-scenes correctly detects John in 2 scenes (Kitchen, Parking)
Backend: POST /api/parse-scenes correctly detects Mike in 1 scene (Parking only)
Backend: POST /api/parse-scenes returns 400 for empty text
Backend: POST /api/parse-scenes returns 400 for empty character name
Backend: POST /api/parse-scenes uses GPT fallback for scripts without standard headers
Backend: POST /api/analyze/batch with 1 scene returns breakdown with script_id
Backend: POST /api/analyze/batch with 2 scenes returns 2 breakdowns sharing same script_id
Backend: POST /api/analyze/batch returns 400 for empty scenes list
Backend: POST /api/analyze/batch returns 400 for >20 scenes
Backend: GET /api/scripts/{script_id} returns script metadata with all linked breakdowns
Backend: GET /api/scripts/{nonexistent} returns 404
Backend: POST /api/analyze/text (Quick mode) still works (regression)
Backend: POST /api/analyze/text (Deep mode) still works (regression)
Frontend: Upload page shows 3 input options (Paste sides, Upload sides, Full Script)
Frontend: Clicking 'Full Script' navigates to Step 2 with large textarea
Frontend: Step 2 shows 'Continue' button after pasting script
Frontend: Step 3 shows character name input with 'Find My Scenes' button
Frontend: Step 3 shows Quick/Deep mode toggle for Full Script
Frontend: After finding scenes, Step 4 shows selectable scene list
Frontend: Scene list shows scene headings, previews, character badges
Frontend: 'YOUR SCENE' tags appear on scenes containing the character
Frontend: 'Break Down N Scenes' button shows correct count
Frontend: Batch analysis completes and shows ScriptOverview
Frontend: ScriptOverview shows scene tabs for navigation
Frontend: ScriptOverview shows Prev/Next buttons and scene counter
Frontend: Scene navigation via tabs and buttons works correctly
Frontend: 'Go Deeper' button appears on Quick mode breakdowns
Frontend: 'Go Deeper' button is HIDDEN on Deep mode breakdowns
Frontend: DEEP badge visible in header for Deep mode breakdowns
Frontend: Emotional Arc and What They Hide cards visible in Deep mode
Regression: Existing 'Paste sides' flow works correctly
Regression: Quick/Deep mode toggle works in Paste sides flow
critical_code_review_comments: server.py lines 126-154: parse_scenes_regex() correctly handles INT./EXT. headers with fallback to numbered scenes
server.py lines 157-175: detect_characters_in_scene() properly identifies ALL CAPS character cues while filtering out scene headers
server.py lines 178-187: character_in_scene() checks both dialogue cues and text mentions (case-insensitive)
server.py lines 920-1001: /api/parse-scenes endpoint has proper validation and GPT fallback for non-standard scripts
server.py lines 1004-1089: /api/analyze/batch correctly links all breakdowns via script_id and handles failures gracefully
UploadPage.jsx: Full Script flow properly manages 4-step wizard state with scene selection
ScriptOverview.jsx: Scene tabs and navigation work correctly with AnimatePresence transitions
BreakdownView.jsx lines 245-278: 'Go Deeper' button correctly hidden when isDeep is true

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all Full Script Mode features verified working)

seed_data_creation: Used sample multi-scene script with 3 scenes (Kitchen, Parking Lot, Apartment) and characters SARAH, JOHN, MIKE for testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Full Script Mode feature fully tested and working. Key test data: Sample script with INT./EXT. headers, 3 scenes, Sarah appears in 2 scenes. Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/test_full_script_mode.py covers all new endpoints. Frontend flow: input-type-fullscript > fullscript-textarea > step-next-2-fullscript > character-name-input > find-scenes-button > scene-item-{n} > analyze-batch-button > script-overview with scene-tab-{n} navigation.
